nodes.label: accountant-anthropic main app
nodes.rationale: Minimal FastAPI entrypoint using shared create_agent_app factory with AccountantAgent and 5 endpoints (analyze-costs, create-budget, calculate-roi, optimize-costs, track-expenses).

nodes.label: create_agent_app factory (agent_common)
nodes.rationale: Shared FastAPI app factory from the agent-common library that standardizes endpoints, health checks, and agent wiring across all anthropic agents.
